      result.A: () => Generator<YieldWrap<Tag<SampleService1, SampleService1>> | YieldWrap<Tag<SampleService2, SampleService2>>, { constant: Effect<number, never, never>; }, any>
      result.E: 
      result.R: 
  [2] kind: pipeTransformation
      label: step 0: Effect.gen
      ordinal: 0
      result.kind: effect
      result.A: { constant: Effect<number, never, never>; }
      result.E: never
      result.R: SampleService1 | SampleService2
Edges (2):
  0 -> 1 [strong] subject
  1 -> 2 [weak] call
